name: Cheesecake Ice Cream (Riv Pe)
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces cream cheese, softened but cool
Pinch kosher salt or table salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill mixing bowl and beaters.
2. Beat cream cheese on medium speed until soft and smooth.
3. Gradually add sugar (1/4 cup at a time), beating well after each addition.
4. Add sour cream, then heavy cream. Mix in salt, lemon juice, and vanilla.
5. Beat just until the mixture is thick and smooth. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
6. Wash beaters and bowl and chill again. Put chilled mixture in cold mixing bowl and beat, gradually increasing speed from low to medium. Beat mixture until light and creamy, about 3 minutes. Serve at once or freeze up to 24 hours. Allow to soften 15 minutes in the refrigerator if frozen.
7. Garnish with strawberries.
